
\newpage

```{r sf-header, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, out.width="900px"}
header_file_create("OM", "Sand Fraction")
knitr::include_graphics(here(root_figure_location, "headers", "om_testing_sand_fraction_plot.png"))
```

```{r sf-table, ft.align="left"}
usga_specs <- tribble(
  ~measurement_name,                                       ~usga_spec,
  "Coarse Sand + Medium Sand (0.5 mm + 0.25 mm)",          "≥ 60 %",
  "Fine Gravel (2.0 mm)",                                  "≤ 3 %", 
  "Fine Gravel + Very Coarse Sand (2.0 mm + 1.0 mm)",      "≤ 10 %",
  "Fine Sand (0.15 mm)",                                   "≤ 20 %",
  "Very Fine Sand + Very Fine Sand (0.106 mm + 0.053 mm)", "≤ 5 %"
)

sf_data <- full_database %>%
  filter(sample_description_number_1 == "SF") %>%
  mutate(
    depth = ifelse(str_detect(sample_description_number_3, "[0-9]-[0-9]"), # depth info either in desc3 or desc4 column
                   sample_description_number_3,
                   sample_description_number_4),
    year = lubridate::year(date_sample_submitted),
    month = lubridate::month(date_sample_submitted),
    depth = as.character(glue::glue("{depth} cm")),
    ## align particle names with those provided by USGA
    measurement_name_db = measurement_name,
    measurement_name = case_when(
      #measurement_name_old == "Fine Gravel - 2 mm (%)" ~ "Fine Gravel (2.0 mm)",
      measurement_name_db %in% c("Fine Gravel - 2 mm (%)", "Very Coarse Sand - 1 mm (%)") ~ "Fine Gravel + Very Coarse Sand (2.0 mm + 1.0 mm)",
      measurement_name_db %in% c("Coarse Sand - 0.5 mm (%)", "Medium Sand - 0.25 mm (%)") ~ "Coarse Sand + Medium Sand (0.5 mm + 0.25 mm)",
      measurement_name_db == "Fine Sand - 0.15 mm (%)" ~ "Fine Sand (0.15 mm)",
      measurement_name_db %in% c("Very Fine Sand - 0.106 mm (%)", "Very Fine Sand - 0.053 mm (%)") ~ "Very Fine Sand + Very Fine Sand (0.106 mm + 0.053 mm)",
      measurement_name_db == "Sand (%)" ~ "Sand",
      TRUE ~ "Undefined in database!"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(site == input_params$site_name) %>%
  filter(month %in% input_params$season) %>%
  group_by(year, measurement_name, depth) %>%
  summarize(measurement_result = sum(measurement_result, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  group_by(depth) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = year, values_from = measurement_result) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  left_join(usga_specs) %>%
  mutate(
    usga_spec = ifelse(is.na(usga_spec), "", usga_spec),
    measurement_name = factor(measurement_name, levels = c(
      "Fine Gravel + Very Coarse Sand (2.0 mm + 1.0 mm)", 
      "Coarse Sand + Medium Sand (0.5 mm + 0.25 mm)",
      "Fine Sand (0.15 mm)",
      "Very Fine Sand + Very Fine Sand (0.106 mm + 0.053 mm)",
      "Sand"
    ))
  ) %>%
  select(depth, measurement_name, usga_spec, everything()) %>%
  arrange(depth, measurement_name)

sf_data %>%
  as_grouped_data('depth') %>% 
  flextable() %>%
  set_header_labels(
    depth = 'Depth',
    measurement_name = 'Particle Size',
    usga_spec = 'USGA Spec',
    trend = 'Trend'
  ) %>%
  # add_header_row(
  #   values = c("",'%Retained'),
  #   colwidths = c(3,2)
  # ) %>%
  add_header_lines(values = c('OM 246 Sand Fractions')) %>% 
  fontsize(size = 12, part = "all") %>%
  colformat_double(big.mark = ",", digits = 1, na_str = "") %>% 
  font(fontname = "Rasa", part = "all") %>%
  bold(bold = TRUE, part = "header") %>%
  bold(j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body") %>%
  align(j = 3, align = "right", part = "all") %>%
  line_spacing(i = 1, space = 1.3, part = "header") %>%
  width(width = .5) %>%
  width(j = 1, width = .7) %>%
  width(j = 2, width = 3.6) %>%
  width(j = 3, width = 1) %>%
  hrule(rule = "exact") %>%
  height_all(height = 5)
```
